query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN public_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as public_count, SUM(CASE WHEN public_status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as private_count FROM timeline_events;
